sections.paragraph:
verb לפרוע

to repay, settle; avenge; dishevel (hair); riot, hold a pogrom, cause disturbances

verb להיפרע

be repayed, settled; avenged; to sue, avenge; become dishevelled (hair)

verb להתפרע

be wild, become unruly

verb להפריע

to disturb, interrupt, interfere

verb הופרע

be disturbed, interrupted
